message.content:
Add CLPP-specific columns to the Archive Details view in the CLPP webui at /home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui.

## Context
The Ingest page has archive details/metadata displayed somewhere. We need to add CLPP-specific columns (Logtypes, Schema, Shared Nodes) that only show when experimental mode is on.

## Task: Find and Modify Archive Details/Metadata Display

1. First, explore the IngestPage to find where archive metadata is displayed:
   - Check `apps/webui/src/pages/IngestPage/` for any Details, Metadata, or table components
   - Check `apps/webui/src/pages/IngestPage/Details/` if it exists
   - Look for any table listing archives with columns

2. Add CLPP columns to the archive table/list:
   - "Logtypes" column — shows the number of logtypes in the archive (from metadata)
   - "Schema" column — shows whether the archive was compressed with a schema (yes/no indicator)
   - "Shared Nodes" column — shows count of shared nodes or a warning badge

These columns should only be visible when `useClppSettingsStore((s) => s.experimentalMode)` is `true`.

Import the store from `@/features/clpp/stores/clpp-settings-store`.

Use the same UI style as the existing archive table (likely Ant Design Table since it's on the IngestPage). Add a `[CLPP]` badge next to the column headers using Ant Design's Tag component.

## Important Notes
- Read existing code first before modifying
- Follow the existing UI patterns (Ant Design on IngestPage)
- Only show CLPP columns when experimental mode is ON
- Use `@/` path alias for imports

All tasks are complete. Here is a summary of the changes:

---

## Summary

Added three CLPP-specific stat cards to the Archive Details view on the IngestPage. These cards are only visible when `useClppSettingsStore((s) => s.experimentalMode)` is `true`.

### New files created

1. **`/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/apps/webui/src/pages/IngestPage/Details/Logtypes.tsx`** -- Displays the number of logtypes in the archive, with a purple `[CLPP]` Tag badge.

2. **`/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/apps/webui/src/pages/IngestPage/Details/Schema.tsx`** -- Displays whether the archive was compressed with a schema (Yes/No), with a purple `[CLPP]` Tag badge.

3. **`/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/apps/webui/src/pages/IngestPage/Details/SharedNodes.tsx`** -- Displays the count of shared nodes and a yellow "Warning" Tag when shared nodes are detected, with a purple `[CLPP]` Tag badge.

### Modified files

4. **`/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/apps/webui/src/components/DashboardCard/index.tsx`** -- Added optional `titleExtra?: React.ReactNode` prop to `DashboardCardProps`. When provided, it renders alongside the title text in a new `.titleRow` flex container. This enables the `[CLPP]` Tag to appear inline next to the card title.

5. **`/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/apps/webui/src/components/DashboardCard/index.module.css`** -- Added `.titleRow` class (flex row with 8px gap and center alignment) to house both the title text and the `titleExtra` element.

6. **`/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/apps/webui/src/pages/IngestPage/Details/index.tsx`** -- Refactored to:
   - Import and use `useClppSettingsStore` for `experimentalMode`
   - Fetch CLPP data from the `logtype-stats` Hono API (only when experimental mode is on)
   - Extract `ClppDetailsCards`, `ClpDetails`, and `ClpsDetails` sub-components to keep the main `Details` component under the complexity limit
   - Conditionally render the three CLPP cards when `experimentalMode` is `true`
   - Switch between 2-column and 3-column grid layouts depending on experimental mode

7. **`/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/apps/webui/src/pages/IngestPage/Details/index.module.css`** -- Added:
   - `.detailsGridClpp` -- 3-column grid for CLP engine view when CLPP cards are present
   - `.timeRangeThreeCol` -- TimeRange spanning 3 columns in the 3-column grid
   - `.clppDetailsGrid` -- 3-column grid for CLP-S engine view with CLPP cards

### Data flow

- The CLPP cards fetch data from the existing `/api/logtype-stats` Hono API endpoint
- `Logtypes` reads `clppData.logtypes.length` for the logtype count
- `Schema` shows "Yes" when logtypes exist, "No" otherwise
- `Shared Nodes` reads `clppData.sharedNodeWarnings.length` and shows a warning badge when the count is above zero
- The query is only enabled when `experimentalMode` is `true`, so there is no API call overhead when the feature is off
